sentence: Closeout years make you Nickelbackolas Caged before you even knock.

wombos.definition: The state of being somewhere between closeted and out — the transitional identity space of moving from hiding one's queerness to living openly.
wombos.example: I was fully closeout that year — out to friends but not to family.

wombos.definition: The state of being simultaneously beloved and widely mocked — achieving a fame so polarizing that admiration and ridicule arrive in equal measure at the same time.
wombos.example: After that speech went viral, he was fully Nickelbackolas Caged — half the internet loved him and the other half couldn't stop clowning him.
